package.name: game_controller_bridge
package.description: L5 mission layer (blueprint §7). Parses the RoboCup Humanoid GameController UDP broadcast on port 3838 (HlRoboCupGameControlData @ 2 Hz), publishes a clean /gc/game_state topic, and emits the mandatory status return on port 3939. It is the ultimate authority: HALT/PENALIZED overrides all AI.
